summary: Iteration 139: Perizia Pro PDF Features - ALL 28 BACKEND TESTS PASS + FRONTEND VERIFIED. Tested SVG tachometer gauge (red/amber/green conformity levels), reference image library (costa, fotocellula, rete, encoder), PDF generation with 4 risks, solution image matching, and API endpoint validation. Frontend verified 'Sopralluoghi & Perizie' sidebar navigation.

ref_images_library.keyword_map_entries: PASS - All 4 base images (costa, fotocellula, rete, encoder) in map

svg_gauge.contains_arc: PASS - SVG contains semicircle arc path
svg_gauge.contains_needle: PASS - SVG contains needle line element

pdf_generation.file_size_with_images: PASS - PDF >100KB with embedded ref images
pdf_generation.low_conformity_28: PASS - PDF generates with red gauge
pdf_generation.medium_conformity_50: PASS - PDF generates with amber gauge
pdf_generation.high_conformity_72: PASS - PDF generates with green gauge

api_endpoint.pdf_400_without_ai_analysis: PASS - Returns 400 with message about AI analysis requirement

frontend_navigation.sopralluoghi_perizie_nav_group: PASS - Nav group exists with label 'Sopralluoghi & Perizie'

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generator uses WeasyPrint correctly with full HTML/CSS styling
Reference images (~800KB total for 4 PNGs) are properly base64 encoded and cached
SVG gauge math is correct for semicircle arc from 180° to 0°
Two-column risk card layout implemented with CSS display:table pattern
Summary box with risk counts (conformity%, rischi critici, rischi medi, dispositivi mancanti, interventi) implemented
test_credentials: Session token created via mongosh for UI testing
seed_data_creation: None - all tests use mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Perizia Pro PDF features fully verified. The generate_perizia_pdf() function in /app/backend/services/pdf_perizia_sopralluogo.py creates professional PDF reports with: (1) Cover page with SVG tachometer gauge showing conformity %, (2) Summary box with risk counts, (3) Two-column risk cards with problem/solution layout, (4) Reference images from /app/backend/services/ref_images/ embedded based on keyword matching. The sidebar navigation 'Sopralluoghi & Perizie' correctly links to /sopralluoghi. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration139_perizia_pro_pdf.py
